Bash(python << 'PYEOF'
import ftplib
import os

FTP_HOST = 'ftp.larosadeiventiaps.org'
FTP_USER = 'larosadeiven478org'
FTP_PASS = '2e4eZ,AE2ftdr3C'
LOCAL_BASE = 'C:/Development/LaRosadeiVenti'

def download_dir\(ftp, remote_dir, local_dir\):
    os.makedirs\(local_dir, exist_ok=True\)
    items = []
    ftp.dir\(remote_dir, items.append\)
    
    for item in items:
        parts = item.split\(None, 8\)
        if len\(parts\) < 9:
            continue
        name = parts[8]
        if name in \('.', '..'\):
            continue
        
        remote_path = remote_dir + '/' + name
        local_path = os.path.join\(local_dir, name\)
        
        if item.startswith\('d'\):
            download_dir\(ftp, remote_path, local_path\)
        else:
            try:
                with open\(local_path, 'wb'\) as f:
                    ftp.retrbinary\('RETR ' + remote_path, f.write\)
            except Exception as e:
                print\(f'  ERRORE: {remote_path} - {e}'\)

ftp = ftplib.FTP\(FTP_HOST\)
ftp.login\(FTP_USER, FTP_PASS\)

# 1. Custom theme
print\('Scaricamento tema la-rosa-dei-venti-aps...'\)
download_dir\(ftp, '/httpdocs/wp-content/themes/la-rosa-dei-venti-aps', 
             os.path.join\(LOCAL_BASE, 'wp-content', 'themes', 'la-rosa-dei-venti-aps'\)\)
print\('  OK'\)

# 2. wp-config.php
print\('Scaricamento wp-config.php...'\)
with open\(os.path.join\(LOCAL_BASE, 'wp-config.php'\), 'wb'\) as f:
    ftp.retrbinary\('RETR /httpdocs/wp-config.php', f.write\)
print\('  OK'\)

# 3. .htaccess
print\('Scaricamento .htaccess...'\)
with open\(os.path.join\(LOCAL_BASE, '.htaccess'\), 'wb'\) as f:
    ftp.retrbinary\('RETR /httpdocs/.htaccess', f.write\)
print\('  OK'\)

# 4. Plugins
print\('Scaricamento plugin...'\)
download_dir\(ftp, '/httpdocs/wp-content/plugins',
             os.path.join\(LOCAL_BASE, 'wp-content', 'plugins'\)\)
print\('  OK'\)

# 5. mu-plugins
print\('Scaricamento mu-plugins...'\)
download_dir\(ftp, '/httpdocs/wp-content/mu-plugins',
             os.path.join\(LOCAL_BASE, 'wp-content', 'mu-plugins'\)\)
print\('  OK'\)

# 6. languages
print\('Scaricamento languages...'\)
download_dir\(ftp, '/httpdocs/wp-content/languages',
             os.path.join\(LOCAL_BASE, 'wp-content', 'languages'\)\)
print\('  OK'\)

ftp.quit\(\)
print\('\\nDownload completato!'\)
# verify
for d in ['wp-content/themes/la-rosa-dei-venti-aps', 'wp-content/plugins', '.htaccess', 'wp-config.php']:
    p = os.path.join\(LOCAL_BASE, d\)
    print\(f'  {d}: {"EXISTS" if os.path.exists\(p\) else "MISSING"}'\)
PYEOF)
